quality.clarity: High. The mechanics of entering, moving between, and exiting the trees are clearly defined.
quality.completeness: Complete. All standard spell fields (level, school, casting time, range, components, duration, classes) are present.
quality.flavor_mechanics_integration: Good. The flavor of striding through trees is well-supported by the movement restrictions and range limits.

mechanics.level_appropriateness: Appropriate for Level 5. The range (500 ft) and conditionality (same kind of living tree) balance the mobility.
mechanics.action_economy: Casting time is 1 action. The spell allows the transportation ability once per round for the duration, which is a good restriction.
mechanics.movement_cost: Clear costs: 5 feet to enter, 5 feet of movement used for the exit/entry step (if movement remains), or ending adjacent if no movement remains.
restrictions: Must use 5 feet of movement to enter.
Can only use transportation ability once per round.
Must end each turn outside a tree.
Trees must be living and at least the same size as the caster.
Range limit of 500 feet to the destination tree.
mechanics.synergy: Excellent synergy with Druid and Ranger classes, fitting their themes of nature manipulation.

analysis.recommendations: None required; the spell entry is well-formed and mechanically sound.
